# Saleshandy — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | △ | 700M+ B2B contacts (largest database of the platforms); real-time verification + refund guarantee; search filters less granular than Apollo |
| [[email-verification]] | △ | Inline verification via TrulyInbox partnership; Inbox Placement Test (2/month free, 120/month Starter, 250/month Pro) |
| [[email-warmup]] | ✓ | Unlimited warm-up on all plans; unlimited email accounts; TrulyInbox partnership; progressive warm-up configuration; pre-configured domains available |
| [[personalisation]] | △ | Dynamic personalisation tags; AI Sequence CoPilot generates multi-step sequences; lacks visual/video personalisation |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | ✓ | A/Z testing up to 26 variants; subsequence branching; inbox rotation; spam-trigger detection before launch; unlimited team members |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | △ | Unified inbox; basic AI-assisted replies; Inbox Radar deliverability monitoring |

## Vendor Type
Value-focused cold email platform. Best price-per-feature ratio for email-only outreach at scale with unlimited team access.

## Best For
Budget-conscious teams or agencies needing unlimited team members, unlimited warm-up, and high-volume email outreach without per-seat pricing. White-labelling available for agencies.

## Limitations
- No native LinkedIn or multichannel capabilities
- Warm-up via TrulyInbox (third-party dependency) vs. Instantly's proprietary 4.2M network
- Inbox management less AI-capable than Instantly's Autopilot
- AI personalisation weaker than Lemlist (no visual/video)
- Prospecting database is largest but filter depth is limited
